summary: The suite covers all five major feature areas required by the task: recursive glob matching, find-only mode, preview with context, search-and-replace with backups, summary reporting, and error handling. The workspace fixture is well-constructed with realistic nested structure. Noteworthy edge cases include binary file skipping, regex back-references in replacements, multiple matches on the same line, selective backup (only files that matched), and invalid regex/missing root errors. Deductions: a few assertions are loose ('>= 2' instead of exact counts), the preview line-number assertion uses an OR condition that suggests implementation uncertainty rather than a pinned contract, and several meaningful edge cases are absent — empty files, files lacking a trailing newline (which affects splitlines behavior), read-only/permission-error files, symlinks, and replacements that introduce regex metacharacters. The class-per-phase organization with RED PHASE comments maps cleanly to TDD intent, and fixture isolation via tmp_path ensures test independence.
